feed.title: VIVID COIL ULTIMATE (VIVID COIL FA D1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM VIVID COIL FA D1.

entry.title: VIVID COIL ULTIMATE (VIVID COIL FA D1) — firmware 2.55.3
entry.summary:
VIVID COIL ULTIMATE VIVID COIL FA D1 — firmware 2.55.3

Part: VIVID COIL ULTIMATE

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23
